---
title: "John Mackenzie"
---

## John Mackenzie

### Description

brother of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

He married Christina Mansfield; 'a real thorough Scotsman with white hair and gracious gentle manners, and his wife is a most admirable person'. [To E. M, Sewell, 4 April 1866; LG 1906]

### Letters

- Letter from August 5 [1869]
- Letter from April 4th [1866]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
